svg.text: QPSK coarse-prefix budget: when the loop stops caring

text.tspan: Same outer-band carrier offset, same loop gains, same symbol-rate model.
Only the front-end sample budget changes, and the post-lock output flattens early.

svg.text: Mean absolute coarse-frequency error at +0.62 rad/sample

text.tspan: lower is better; units are mrad/sample

svg.text: Tracked tail RMS after the Costas loop

text.tspan: this is the part that flattens once the handoff is already good enough
threshold = first prefix whose mean coarse-frequency error drops below 5 mrad/sample
the loop panel shows why this is mostly a front-end honesty story
